title: ocotea nummularia
intro: Ocotea nummularia is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to South America, and is also known as 'Palo Santo' in Spanish, which translates to 'Holy Wood'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its essential oil. The health benefits of Ocotea nummularia include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Ocotea nummularia can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oil, capsules, and teas, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
